note: Trained on Kaggle dataset 'barkataliarbab/license-plate-detection-dataset-10125-images' via Colab GPU. Metrics reported directly from the training run's validation split (2195 plate instances) — not independently re-measured locally, since the raw dataset was not downloaded to this machine.
real_world_spot_check: Confirmed functionally correct on a clean synthetic plate (77% confidence, accurate box, OCR read 9/10 characters correctly). Did not detect a plate in a real low-resolution distant motorcycle photo (sample_images/test.jpg) — same image also failed under the prior classical-CV-only approach, so this is a pre-existing image-resolution limit, not a regression.
